title: Lattice distortion of crystalline-amorphous nickel molybdenum sulfide nanosheets for high-efficiency overall water splitting: libraries of lone pairs of electrons and in situ surface reconstitution

paper_analysis.summary: The paper reports an experimentally synthesized crystalline-amorphous NiMoS4 nanosheet electrocatalyst with lattice distortion and sulfur defects that enhances overall water-splitting performance.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: Likely contains supporting experimental details, figures, and characterization data in the supplementary information; no explicit standalone dataset is indicated.

dataset_characterization.processed_data_description: Likely contains supporting experimental details, figures, and characterization data in the supplementary information; no explicit standalone dataset is indicated.
dataset_characterization.data_organization: A supplementary PDF is available on the publisher site (RSC supplementary file d1nr07438e1.pdf). No separate repository or source-data files were found, and the paper's data availability statement was not found.
